bullet.title: Enterprise SaaS
bullet.body: Built multi-tenant SaaS platforms with PHP (Symfony, Laravel) including SSO, rollout management, BI dashboards, and document management systems across 10+ interconnected services

bullet.title: E-Commerce & Gov-Tech
bullet.body: ContentSpeed e-commerce platform with marketplace API; government digitization projects (ONRC, IMR, Antreprenor+); HR/careers platforms and Swibeco benefits system

bullet.title: Scrapers & Data
bullet.body: Web crawlers, news aggregators, review scanners, domain scanners, property scrapers, and meta parsers for competitive intelligence and data mining

bullet.title: Automation & Bots
bullet.body: Telegram bots for trading signals, Gmail daily digests, device login monitoring; browser extensions for Plex/Netflix intro skipping and filelist.io

bullet.title: Finance & AI
bullet.body: Stock predictions with NeuralProphet, sentiment-based trading signals using Fear & Greed Index + technical indicators, ML-driven stock analysis

bullet.title: Infrastructure
bullet.body: Cloudflare Workers, deployment pipelines, SSO systems, scaling multi-tenant SaaS platforms

bullet.title: Mobile
bullet.body: Native iOS (Swift/Obj-C), Android (Java), and cross-platform (Dart/Flutter) apps

currently_exploring: AI/ML applied to real-world automation and business tooling
